overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a desert shantytown at blue hour. The player moves through dirt paths between corrugated metal shacks and abandoned vehicles, transitioning from hazy twilight to areas illuminated by neon signs and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert shantytown dirt road with power transmission infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path between shacks and power lines

entered.detail: tall metal lattice tower with multiple power lines extending across the scene
makeshift building constructed from corrugated metal sheets with a sloped roof
tall palm tree silhouetted against the dark blue sky
multiple horizontal power cables stretching across the sky
derelict vehicle with rusted body parked beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking through a desert shantytown during blue hour. A large power transmission tower dominates the left side while makeshift corrugated metal shacks line the right. The ground is unpaved dirt, and the atmosphere is hazy with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt thoroughfare between scattered shacks

events.description: begins a slight right turn while continuing forward, moving away from the power transmission tower

agents.ego_description: continuing forward with a slight right turn toward distant lights visible ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a boundary along the path
glowing headlights from a vehicle visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the power infrastructure and continues through the open dirt thoroughfare. The transmission tower recedes behind as the view opens up toward distant lights. Wooden fences and scattered shacks line the path while palm trees dot the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: shantytown commercial strip with neon signage and holographic displays

events.description: red neon signs become visible ahead, casting colored light on the surroundings
holographic billboard materializes in the distance, marking entry to a more commercial zone

agents.ego_description: turning right toward buildings with glowing red neon signs and a large holographic display

entered.detail: red neon sign with 'NC' lettering mounted on a shack wall
large floating holographic advertisement displaying green and yellow graphics

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more built-up area as the camera turns right toward commercial structures. Red neon signs illuminate the darkness, and a large holographic billboard becomes the focal point ahead. The lighting shifts from pure blue hour to a mix of natural and artificial sources.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with warm street lighting

events.description: passing the holographic billboard into an area dominated by warm orange sodium street lighting

agents.ego_description: turning left past the holographic billboard into a more open area lit by street lamps

entered.detail: tall pole with bright orange sodium lamp illuminating the dirt ground
cluster of shacks and structures with various light sources in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving past the holographic billboard into an open intersection bathed in warm orange street lighting. The atmosphere shifts from the cool blue haze to a warmer, more illuminated environment as the player approaches a junction with multiple paths and distant glowing structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a desert shantytown that transforms from a hazy, blue-hour wasteland into a vibrant, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by moving past a towering power transmission tower and corrugated metal shacks along a dusty, unpaved path under a dim twilight sky. As the camera advances, the industrial infrastructure recedes and the view opens up toward distant lights, passing wooden fences and scattered palm trees on the horizon. The scene then shifts toward a more developed commercial area, where the cool blue atmosphere is interrupted by glowing red neon signs and a towering holographic billboard. Finally, the camera glides past the hologram and into an open junction, where the lighting transitions from a cold haze to the warm orange glow of street lamps and distant illuminated structures.
